topic4.title: Promotion:
topic4.desc1: The Warrior is the backbone of the Firefly army, but they need something a little heavier to take the damage. You can promote sufficiently levelled warriors into Demolishers. Wrecking machines that soak damage as well as deal it out.

topic3.desc1: Shamans can later be promoted into Spirit Walkers, a summoner/healer class, or Warlocks, a ranged damage class with a few support abilities.

topic1.title: Description:
topic1.desc1: Heavily armored with shield and spear, the Demolisher is a goblin defender.

topic2.title: What it does:
topic2.desc1: The Demolisher relies on aggro drawing abilities to draw the enemies to it, and then slices them down with incredible strength. Uses a shield and spear.

topic3.title: Combat Antics:
topic3.desc1: Unlike the hearthling 'knight', the Demolisher can form a strong offence as well as defence. The Demolisher has a number of abilities that improves their damage output in combat.

warlock.title: Warlock
warlock.description1: A ranged caster that can slow down and ignite enemies

topic1.title: Description:
topic1.desc1: The Warlock is a ranged combatant, using magic to attack enemies from far away.

topic2.title: What it does:
topic2.desc1: very lightly armored, the warlock instead relies on ranged combat with magical attacks. The warlock can use arcane magics to slow enemies, or ignite them, causing them to burn.

topic3.title: Area of Effect:
topic3.desc1: [WIP] The warlock can project their arcane magic in powerful waves to affect multiple enemies.

glory_of_valor.description: A proven fighter, this goblin has shown they can handle more than the average hearthling.

mending_totem.description: The natural healing of this goblin is increased.

skull_charm.description: Understanding the power of this skull boosts the Spirit Walkers healing ability.

ogre_boned_trait.description: Noone dared ask about [name(i18n_data.entity)]'s parentage, but suffice it to say, they are bigger than your average goblin... and probably stronger, too.

puny_trait.description: This goblin is smaller than average, and isn't very good in fights.

bone_crown.description: A celebratory crown made from the trophies of powerful enemies.
bone_crown.flavor: It 'll also keep your head warm in those long winters.

stone_armor.description: Thick and heavy armor hewn from the very earth, imbued with essence of Firefly to be lighter and more movable than normal.
stone_armor.flavor: So much stone... They must be so strong!

wooden_knight_helm.description: A wooden helm styled after the shiny helmets of the human colonies.

palisade_gate.description: A sturdy wooden gate for your palisade walls.

reinforced_stone_door.description: A stronger, sturdier door made of pure stone.

reinforced_stone_window.description: A tough window made of hardened stone.

reinforced_wooden_double_door.description: Twice the doors, Twice the strength.

large_healing_tonic.description: The most potent healing tonic known to goblins.

gong_of_courage.description: A decorative gong made from the hats of defeated enemy kobolds.

show_of_victory.description: A wall tapestry made form salvaged materials, once showing a mighty foot soldier.

ramshackle_dummy.description: A makeshift training dummy made with odds and ends, mostly wood, and decorated to give it some modesty. NOT SAFE FOR USE.

protection_totem.description: A protective talisman, imbued with the essence of firefly.

mending_totem.description: A talisman imbued to help with the natural healing of herbs.

berzerk_totem.description: A talisman granting great strength to the one who wields it.

shrunken_skull_charm.description: A charm crafted from the skull of a poor small animal. Understanding the power of this charm could be important for a Spirit Walker.

leather_bolt.flavor: It's not the tidiest, and there are still patches of fur here and there, but it should still be usable...

chill_touch.description: A powerful arcane blast of cold.

goblin_bone_spear.description: A simple spear for the aspiring demolisher.

goblin_long_cleaver.description: A long pointy thing, made and used by the Firefly Clan.

goblin_pole_mace.description: A long blunt weapon that can double as a destructive tool.

goblin_trident.description: A three pronged weapon, used by the goblins.

magma_spear.description: a longer seared version of the magma sword, a magmarized blade.

demolisher_description.description: A dangerous protector with immense power when properly trained.

level_1_data.perk_000_description: Increases Stamina, Courage, and draws attention from monsters
level_1_data.perk_001_description: The Demolisher gains an additional 10% defense from equipment

level_2_data.perk_000_description: The Demolisher intimidates the opponent, drawing the attention of nearby enemies.

level_4_data.perk_000_description: The Demolisher gains an additional 20% armor from equipment

level_5_data.perk_000_description: The Demolisher furiously performs a triple slash attack.

level_6_data.perk_000_description: The Demolisher boosts courage of everyone around

demolisher_armor.description: Ragged armor that has seen many conflicts. Granted to only the strongest, and most reckless warriors.

demolisher_helm.description: A leather skullcap with a mask, adorned with pieces of bone.

shield_talisman.description: The power of the guardian. Kindness to aid friends. A shield to repel all.

warlock_description.description: Having harnessed the arcane, the warlock is a dangerous combatant.

level_1_data.perk_000_description: The warlock attacks with cold damage, causing great pain to the tribes foes.

level_2_data.perk_000_description: The warlock can slow enemies, making them crawl to a slow, agonizing demise.

level_3_data.perk_000_description: Through truly magical means, the warlock can ignite their enemies, causing damage over time.

level_5_data.perk_000_description: The warlock can slow multiple enemies, making them crawl to a slow, agonizing demise.

level_4_data.perk_000_description: The warlock targets the enemys greatest fear, and brings it to life.

slow.description: You get the feeling a snail would mvoe faster...

staff_talisman.description: The power of the mystic. Inner strength. A staff of wonder and ruin.

warlock_outfit.description: A sleeveless robe, woven from plant fibers.

warlock_hood.description: A light cloth covering, just enough to give a spooky kinda feeling.
